title: quercus salicina var. stenophylla
intro: Quercus salicina var. stenophylla, also known as the narrow-leaved evergreen oak or Chinese evergreen oak, is a deciduous tree species native to China and parts of Central Asia, characterized by its distinctive narrow leaves and small acorns. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Quercus salicina var. stenophylla include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
